description: CSS Flexbox: flex-direction, justify-content, align-items, flex-wrap, gap, flex-grow/shrink/basis
visual_assertions: flex-direction: row container should show items A, B, C arranged horizontally side by side
flex-direction: column container should show items A, B, C stacked vertically
justify-content: flex-start should pack items to the left edge
justify-content: center should center items horizontally within the container
justify-content: flex-end should push items to the right edge
justify-content: space-between should spread items with equal space between but none at the edges
align-items: flex-start should top-align items when one is taller
align-items: center should vertically center all items relative to the tallest
align-items: stretch should make all items fill the container height
flex-wrap container with 8 items should wrap items onto multiple rows when they exceed container width
gap: 4px container should have smaller gaps between items than gap: 24px container
flex-grow: 2 item should be approximately twice as wide as flex-grow: 1 items
